Napoli Dominate Milan to Reach Italian Super Cup Final

Dec 19, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Napoli Secure Statement Win in Italian Super Cup Semi-Final

Napoli delivered a composed and tactical performance to defeat AC Milan 2–0 in the Italian Super Cup semi-final, restoring momentum and reaffirming their elite credentials.
